ogTitle: Keysland vs Khosh Bulduk: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keysland and Khosh Bulduk.
heading: Keysland vs Khosh Bulduk — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keysland, Queensland and Khosh Bulduk, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Khosh Bulduk has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Keysland (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keysland or Khosh Bulduk safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keysland has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Khosh Bulduk scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keysland scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Khosh Bulduk scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keysland or Khosh Bulduk?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Khosh Bulduk has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
